title: Lissy
writer: Hans-Joachim Wallstein, Alex Wedding, F.C. Weiskopf
actors: Sonja Sutter, Horst Drinda, Hans-Peter Minetti
plot: A story about the rise of Nazism based on a novel by a German-Jewish author who managed to survive by fleeing to the USA. The movie focuses on working class Berliner Lissy Schroeder who marries clerk Alfred Frohmeyer believing he ...
